# discord_category_channel (Resource)

Manages a category channel in a Discord guild.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "discord_category_channel" "general" {
  server_id = "123456789012345678"
  name      = "General"
  position  = 0
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Channel name.
- `server_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the guild.

### Optional

- `position` (Number) Sorting position of the channel.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Snowflake ID of the channel.
